title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§688.  Rules and regulations

The secretary of the department may prescribe such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry into effect and enforce the provisions of this Part.  

Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July 17, 1978.
doc_text:
§688.  Rules and regulations
The secretary of the department may prescribe such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry into effect and enforce the provisions of this Part.
Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §5, eff. July 17, 1978.
